lead: Exploring the intersection of technology and health, recent developments highlight both the benefits and challenges of digital health tools and infrastructure.

stories.title: I tried Google’s new health app. It can’t replace a real trainer
stories.summary: Google's new health app, touted as a personal coach, offers insights into heart health, sleep, and exercise. However, users find that it lacks the personalized touch and motivation that a real trainer provides. The app's AI capabilities are impressive, but they may not be enough to replace human interaction in fitness training.

stories.title: Samsung Health app gets big refresh ahead of Galaxy Watch 9 release
stories.summary: As Samsung prepares for the Galaxy Watch 9 launch, the Samsung Health app has received a significant update. This refresh aims to enhance user experience and integrate more comprehensive health tracking features, positioning Samsung's ecosystem as a strong competitor in the wearable health technology market.

stories.title: The Apple Watch needs a better Siri more than the iPhone right now
stories.summary: The Apple Watch's health features could be significantly improved with a more capable Siri. As Apple continues to expand its health suite, a better voice assistant could enhance user interaction and streamline health monitoring tasks, making the device more effective for health-conscious consumers.

stories.title: The Fitbit Air is a good wearable weighed down by a chatty AI 'coach'
stories.summary: The Fitbit Air is praised for its minimalist design and reliable fitness tracking capabilities. However, users find that the AI 'coach' can be overly chatty and may detract from the user experience. This raises questions about the balance between AI assistance and user autonomy in health wearables.

stories.title: Rehumanizing global health care with agentic AI
stories.summary: The global health care system is facing unprecedented challenges due to underinvestment and increasing demand. The article discusses the potential of agentic AI to improve care delivery and address issues like staff burnout and fragmented access. By rehumanizing interactions, AI could play a vital role in enhancing patient care.

stories.title: NHS to close-source hundreds of GitHub repos over AI, security concerns
stories.summary: The NHS plans to close-source numerous GitHub repositories due to concerns over AI and security. This decision highlights the tension between open-source collaboration and the need for secure, compliant health data management, particularly as AI technologies become more integrated into healthcare systems.

stories.title: Suit filed against controversial planned Stratos datacenter project in Utah
stories.summary: Residents in Utah have filed a lawsuit against the Stratos datacenter project, citing health concerns and lack of public input. The project, backed by celebrity investor Kevin O’Leary, has faced criticism for its potential negative impact on community health and well-being, raising questions about the intersection of technology and public health.
